programme.title: Eddie Griffin Undeniable
programme.desc: This comedy special is Eddie Griffin's magnum opus about the world, relationships and humanity as a whole.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham Very Special Christmas Special
programme.desc: Jeff Dunham's first holiday special is a one-of-a-kind live event unlike any Yuletide celebration youve ever seen!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this Chuck Norris action classic! You'll laugh, you'll cry, you probably won't be so silent about the great deal of rage you'll feel. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Silent Rage!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short about a boy who has to take his goat to the market. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Zlateh the Goat!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The Visitor's got ambitious cinematography, big names, and a score that makes The Goblin sound like they barfed on their Casio. But the result is a baffling mess, as incoherent as it is unintentionally funny. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of Mystery Science Theater 3000).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Scientists try to cure all disease and instead make monsters! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mary Jo and Bridget from RiffTrax.

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short about a dirty dog that really doesn't want a bath. Join Bridget and Mary Jo for Harry The Dirty Dog!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: When a boy and a girl spot strange lights in the sky, nobody could predict that thirty years later they'd reunite and fall in love, because that is very stupid. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of MST3K).

programme.title: White Sands
programme.desc: A small southwestern town sheriff finds a body in the desert with a suitcase and $500,000. He impersonates the man and stumbles into an FBI investigation.

programme.title: Vice (2018)
programme.desc: VICE explores the story of Dick Cheney, a bureaucratic Washington insider, who quietly wielded immense power as Vice-President to George W. Bush, reshaping the country and the globe in ways that we still feel today.

programme.title: Half Past Dead
programme.desc: Alcatraz has just re-opened, but the first criminal slated for the electric chair is also sitting on a secret worth $200 million. And an invading group of commandos isn't going to let his fortune go up in smoke. Undercover FBI Agent Petrosevitch has to neutralize the situation.

programme.title: Mission Impossible: Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: Agent Ethan Hunt and his elite team go underground after a bombing implicates them as terrorists. While trying to clear their name, the team uncovers a plot to start a nuclear war.

programme.title: My Week with Marilyn
programme.desc: An assistant on the set of THE PRINCE AND THE SHOWGIRL documents the week he spent befriending Marilyn Monroe (Williams) and helping her escape the pressures of fame and Hollywood.

programme.title: White Sands
programme.desc: A small southwestern town sheriff finds a body in the desert with a suitcase and $500,000. He impersonates the man and stumbles into an FBI investigation.

programme.title: Vice (2018)
programme.desc: VICE explores the story of Dick Cheney, a bureaucratic Washington insider, who quietly wielded immense power as Vice-President to George W. Bush, reshaping the country and the globe in ways that we still feel today.

programme.title: Hard Cash
programme.desc: Just released from prison, master thief Thomas Taylor (Christian Slater) masterminds a scheme to rob an off-track betting operation with his new crew. After discovering that the $1.9 million loot is marked, the crew becomes involved with corrupt FBI Agent Mark Cornell (Val Kilmer), who has some schemes of his own.

programme.title: Triangle
programme.desc: When Jess (Melissa George) sets sail on a yacht with a group of friends, she cannot shake the feeling that there is something wrong. Her suspicions are realized when the yacht hits a storm in the Bermuda Triangle and the group is forced to board a passing ocean liner to get to safety. The ship appears deserted, but Jess is convinced she's been on board before. They soon realize they are not alone... Someone is intent on hunting them down, one by one.

programme.title: Deepwater Horizon
programme.desc: Mark Wahlberg leads an all-star cast in this unforgettably powerful movie inspired by the thrilling story of real-life heroes on a burning oil rig.

programme.title: I Spy
programme.desc: A super-powerful experimental spy plane is stolen by an evil arms dealer and is about to be handed over to an international terrorist. The U.S. Government drafts an egotistical boxing star to join a suave special agent on a dangerous top-secret mission to get the plane back.

programme.title: The Age of Adaline
programme.desc: Blake Lively is captivating as Adaline, a 29-year-old who survives a near-death experience and from that day on, never grows older. Adaline guards her secret and her heart for eight decades until a charming philanthropist (Michiel Huisman) and his parents (Harrison Ford and Kathy Baker) force Adaline to confront her destiny in this unforgettable tale about the timeless power of love.

programme.title: Purple Violets
programme.desc: Patti Petalson, who struggles with the pressure of becoming the next important American writer, discovers she is married to an unfaithful chef, and tales a job in real estate

programme.title: Good Advice
programme.desc: An ex-Wall Street wiz finds a new niche by posing as a female advice-column writer. Can his secret stay under wraps? Romcom fun with Charlie Sheen, Denise Richards.

programme.title: Groundhog Day
programme.desc: Bill Murray's weatherman relives Groundhog Day endlessly in this comedic time-loop adventure.

programme.title: The Water is Wide
programme.desc: Hallmark Hall of Fame. During the 1960s, a schoolteacher comes to the coast of South Carolina to teach.

programme.title: Decoration Day
programme.desc: Hallmark Hall of Fame. A grumpy man must rejoin his community when his godchild gets in trouble.

programme.desc: Hallmark Hall of Fame. The story follows the spiritual journeys of three men.

programme.desc: Hallmark Movie. A marriage therapist tries to fix her marriage by trying to change her husband.

programme.desc: Juliana and Deb's mother announces her plans to remarry and sell the estate.

programme.title: Wolfgang Dauner & Charlie Mariano
programme.sub-title: Piano and Sax: Charlie Mariano & Wolfgang Dauner
programme.desc: Piano and saxophone - this is an individualistic jazz duo combination. But the melodiousness and maturity of Charlie Mariano's saxophone and the freshness and feistiness of Wolfgang Dauner's piano turn the meeting of these two jazz greats into a thrilling interplay.

programme.title: Oscar Peterson Trio, Stuff Smith & Ella Fitzgerald
programme.sub-title: O.P. Trio and E. Fitz. - Jazz At The Philharmonic
programme.desc: The Royal Concertgebouw in Amsterdam is a world-renowned concert hall, known for its first-rate acoustics. It has attracted many famous performers over the years and is one of the Netherlands' most treasured musical institutions. On May 5, 1957, jazz impresario Norman Granz presented his Jazz at the Philharmonic tour at the Concertgebouw in Amsterdam. The Canadian pianist Oscar Peterson and his trio of guitarist Herb Ellis and bassist Ray Brown are later joined by trumpeter Roy Eldridge and drummer Jo Jones. As an added attraction, American violinist Stuff Smith joins the proceedings. American singer Ella Fitzgerald, accompanied by pianist Don Abney, Ellis, Brown and Jones, hits her vocal peak in a stunning set that culminates in a jam session of It Don't Mean A Thing (If It Ain't Got That Swing) with the entire ensemble.

programme.title: Wes Montgomery, Pim Jacobs, Ruud Jacobs & Han Bennink
programme.sub-title: Guitarlegend Wes Montgomery in The Netherlands
programme.desc: Wes Montgomery: Live in '65 shines a light on one of the most unique and influential guitarists in music history. These beautifully filmed programs from the spring of 1965 feature Wes, in intimate studio settings, leading three different lineups through some of his best-known tunes, including “Four On Six”, “Jingles”, and “West Coast Blues”. This rare footage, featuring rehearsals, between-song banter, and closeup camera angles, illuminates Wes's extraordinary musical vocabulary and unconventional picking technique.

programme.title: Marion Williams
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Toninho Ferragutti, Fabio Leal, Cleber Almeida & Cassio Ferreira
programme.desc: The Da Pá Virada Sessions series presents the best musicians of contemporary Brazilian jazz, and beyond. Filmed in São Paulo, each session offers a unique experience by giving a fresh look into Brazil's music scene. The artists for each session are selected in consultation with Stingray DJAZZ's music editor. One of the artists taking part in this episode is Grammy-award nominated accordionist Toninho Ferragutti. Today he is one of Brazil's leading jazz-inspired accordionists, whose music is often categorized as música popular brasileira (MPB). Together with Fabio Leal (acoustic guitar), Cleber Almeida (drums), Cassio Ferreira (saxophone), and Thiago Alves (bass), Toninho performs Brazil's beautiful melodies with his trademark virtuosity.

programme.title: Herbie Mann, Marc Cohen, Romero Lubambo & Paul Socolow
programme.desc: 'Münchner Klaviersommer' was an annual concerts series that took place from 1981 to 1998 in Munich, Germany. Although the festival's name suggests a strong focus on piano music, it featured countless famous musicians from jazz and classical music – not just pianists. The concerts were usually held in July at The Gasteig, home of the Munich Philharmonic. In 1990, American flautist Herbert Jay Solomon, better known by his stage name Herbie Mann, was one of the artists appearing here. Together with Marc Cohen on piano, Romero Lubambo on guitar, Paul Socolow on bass, and both Ricky Sebastian and Cyro Baptista on percussion, Herbie Mann performs his infectious take on Brazilian-inspired music in this concert titled 'Jasil Brazz'.

programme.title: Seal
programme.desc: Seals one-of-a-kind soaring, husky baritone voice is perfect for any genre. Hes delighted fans and earned critical acclaim while staying true to classic, honest songwriting in his remarkable two-decade career. And now, hes done it again with the release of his exceptional sixth studio album Soul. Together with legendary music producer David Foster, Seal adds his signature touch to some of the best soul songs ever created. In a stunning performance, Seal evokes an era when music vividly captured emotion and romance. Joined by Foster, as well as a choir and string section, Seal takes on Ann Pebbles I Cant Stand the Rain, Sam Cookes A Change Is Gonna Come, and Harold Melvin and the Blue Notes If You Dont Know Me By Now. Tune in and catch more timeless favorites and hits like Kiss From a Rose.

programme.title: Lana Del Rey
programme.desc: Born to Die is the second album by singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, and the first to be officially released on January 27, 2012 and that would lead to global success In countries such as the United Kingdom the album was the best selling of that year, that recognition made her a guest of honor in one of the most popular London festivals iTunes Festival, where she would open the awe of all attendees on the night of September 25 2012 at the Roundhouse in the city of London.

programme.title: Rodolfo Mederos, Otros Aires, Teresa Parodi & Café de los Maestros
programme.desc: For the audience in the famous ballroom El Palacio in Buenos Aires, the year 2012 began with tango rhythms and Argentinean folk music. This festive broadcast opens with a tango performance by dance partners Eduardo and Gloria, accompanied by the renowned ensemble Café de los Maestros. Another highlights is a performance by bandoneon player Rodolfo Mederos and his trio. In addition, the concert features a performance by Teresa Parodi, former lead singer of the Astor Piazzolla Band, accompanied by the Fernando Suárez Paz Quintet. Also on the bill is the contemporary electronic tango formation Otros Aires. Founded by Miguel Di Genova in 2003, Otros Aires combines electronic rhythms and traditional tango instruments, such as the bandoneon, piano, and guitar. On the program are compositions by Astor Piazzolla, Pedro Maffia, Pedro Laurenz, Gustavo Mozzi, and many others. Enjoy this concert of music and dance, featuring some of Argentine's tango scene's finest artists!

programme.title: Federico Guglielmo & Roberto Loreggian
programme.sub-title: Works by Matteis, Tartini, Bach & Vivaldi
programme.desc: The six-concert series “Io suono italiano” is dedicated to music of Italian composers and performed by Italian musicians on Italian instruments. The concert programs cover four centuries of music: from Girolamo Frescobaldi and Antonio Vivaldi to more contemporary music by Ennio Morricone and Azio Corghi. Each program presents more familiar pieces alongside lesser-known compositions. These performances were filmed at the atmospheric Teatro Sociale in Rovigo, Italy, in January 2021. In this program, Federico Guglielmo (violin) and Roberto Loreggian (harpsichord) present Baroque music. On the program are Nicola Matteis's Passaggio rotto e Andamento veloce per violino solo (from Ayres for the Violini), Giuseppe Tartini's Sonata in G minor Op. 1 No. 10 (B.g10) “Didone abbandonata”, J. S. Bach's Concerto in F major for solo harpsichord, BWV 978 (a transcription of Antonio Vivaldi's Violin Concerto in G major, Op. 3 No. 3, RV 310), and Vivaldi's Sonata IV in D major, RV 755.

programme.title: Quatuor Ebène
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - String Quartet No. 7 & 13, and Op. 133
programme.desc: Renowned French string quartet Quatuor Ébène marked the 250th birth anniversary of Ludwig van Beethoven (1770-1827) with a remarkable project: recording all of the great composer's sixteen string quartets. For five years, violinists Pierre Colombet and Gabriel Le Magadure, violist Marie Chilemme, and cellist Raphaël Merlin immersed themselves in Beethoven's 650 pages of sheet music. Their efforts culminated in the performance of the composer's complete repertoire for string quartet, which covers three decades of Beethoven's musical creativity, during six impressive concerts at Philharmonie de Paris in the autumn of 2020. Quatuor Ébène explored every facet of Beethoven's string quartet repertoire: from the youthful Opus 18 string quartets to the Razumovsky, Harp, and Serioso quartets (Opus 59, 74, and 95) from his middle period, and finally, the depth of his late quartets (Opus 127 to 135). This program features Quatuor Ébène performing Beethoven's String Quartet No. 7 in F major, Op. 59, No. 1, known as “Razumovsky” String Quartet No. 13 in B-flat major, Op. 130 and the monumental Great Fugue, Op. 133. This concert performance was recorded at Philharmonie de Paris on October 12, 2020.

programme.title: Julie Berthollet, Camille Berthollet, Guillaume Vincent & Ensemble Appassionato
programme.sub-title: Berthollet Sisters at Théâtre des Champs-Élysées
programme.desc: For this exceptional recital, recorded in 2019 at the Théâtre des Champs-Élysées, Camille (cello) and Julie Berthollet (violin) are accompanied by pianist Guillaume Vincent and the Ensemble Appassionato under the direction of Mathieu Herzog. The two musical sisters have chosen a repertoire which crosses genres and eras to explore the expressive palette of the violin and cello, from the baroque of Vivaldi to the jazzy notes of Django Reinhardt and Stéphane Grapelli. Among the works on the program are Brahms Hungarian Dances No. 5 and No. 6, Karl Jenkins' Palladio, 'Theme from Forrest Gump' by Alan Silvestri, Schumann's Piano Quintet, Op. 44, The Red Violin by Corigliano, Hungarian Rhapsody, op. 68 by Popper, Minor Swing by Reinhardt/Grappeli and Csárdás by Monti.

programme.title: Elena Bashkirova, Baiba Skride, Itamar Zorman & Krzysztof Chorzelski
programme.desc: During late summer every year, some of the world's best musicians meet in Israel for the Jerusalem International Chamber Music Festival (JCMF), established by pianist Elena Bashkirova and Yeheskell Beinisch. In 2016, the 19th festival was dedicated to the music of interrelated composers, such as Brahms and Schumann, and Schubert and Beethoven – performed by outstanding artists such as Sir András Schiff, Baiba Skride, Menahem Pressler and Emmanuel Pahud in the halls of the Jerusalem YMCA. This documentary film features excerpts from performances of the following works: Johannes Brahms's String Sextet no. 1, Op. 18 Franz Schubert's Arpeggione Sonata in A minor, D. 821 Antonín Dvořák's Piano Quintet no. 2 in A major, Op. 81 Ferruccio Busoni's Fantasia Contrappuntistica Felix Mendelssohn's Piano Trio no. 1, Op. 49 and Ludwig van Beethoven's Quintet for Piano and Winds, Op. 16.

programme.title: Sin senos sí hay paraíso
programme.desc: Catalina y Nachito duermen juntos, pese a la negativa de Albeiro. Tienen relaciones y se juran amor eterno. El padre de Catalina pierde la cabeza y lo apunta con un arma de fuego.

programme.title: Sin senos sí hay paraíso
programme.desc: Nachito convence a Albeiro de que Catalina es el amor de su vida. Hernán Darío es aceptado en la familia. El Titi visita a Marcial en el hospital. Inhabilitado, el excapo renuncia a la vida.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Joe e Isabel ya tienen los boletos para ir a Nueva York. Mientras, Nacho deja de aconsejar a Judy para recuperar a su mujer. Cecilia hace una llamada anónima a la policía.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Isabel va al aeropuerto con Joe rumbo a Nueva York, pero un imprevisto complica todo en pleno vuelo. Drake y Judy sospechan de Fernández y comparten sus dudas con Nacho.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Ledher enfrenta a Nacho después de abandonar Panamá. Montero le jura lealtad y le advierte que el cártel de Cali lo quiere muerto.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Nacho va al aeropuerto para ir a Nueva York a buscar a Isabel, pero ahí un agente lo arresta. Ledher negocia con Thompson: exige inmunidad para él y para Montero.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Thompson llega al hotel donde se hospedan los cabecillas de la droga en Panamá, pero el presidente Noriega y su ejército lo enfrentan. Albertico se oculta en un barril de basura.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Escobar quiere saber quién los delató y Thompson, arrestado y aislado en un búnker, servirá como carnada. Kyle lleva a Isabel y a su hijo a la boca del lobo.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Ledher señala a Judy y Escobar la captura con vida para que confiese. Nacho se entera de la jugada de Lehder y alerta al Paisa. Isabel ruega por la vida de su hijo.

programme.title: Aurora: Amor silencioso
programme.desc: Pelear por el amor de Aurora condena a Martín a vivir su amor en silencio. Siguen los ataques de Federico, que golpea a Martín en la cabeza. Aurora trata de entregarle su corazón a Martín sinceramente.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Rosa tiene dificultades para detener a José Ignacio, busca razones para seguir en su posición. Raquel y Gerardo tienen fricciones, pues sus hijos quieren respuestas sobre lo sucedido con Horacio.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: José Ignacio avisa a los cuatro vientos sus planes con Eva, pero Bárbara no se queda tranquila. Rosa controla la rebelión en Venus y los resultados la avalan, pronto llegan nuevas preocupaciones.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Acorralada, Rosa debe contarle toda la verdad a Antonio, pero él quiere saber un poco más. Margaret cambia las pastillas que toma Rosaura. Sergio comienza una venganza contra su amigo José Ignacio.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Bárbara viaja a San Miguel de Allende y descubre un detalle importante sobre Eva. Aumenta la preocupación por la condición de Rosaura. Andrea se siente traicionada y Gabriel no le da tregua.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Raquel habla con Rosaura. Antonio tiene muchas preguntas, y Rosa le exige que le diga qué sabe sobre su mamá. La felicidad que José Ignacio trata de construir con Eva está cerca de desinflarse.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Ramón le sigue el juego a Bárbara y le dice exactamente lo que ella quiere escuchar. El pasado se acerca más y más a Andrea y Gabriel. Rosa está por confesarle la verdad a José Ignacio.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Rosaura confunde a Eduardito con su hijo Ernesto. Rosa está desesperada y Bárbara aprovecha. José Ignacio solo quiere saber de sus propios planes. Federico no baja la guardia frente a Rodolfo.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Acorralada - Paco Va al Hospital: Paco visita a Gaviota en el hospital y le reclama porque no le aviso antes lo que había sucedido.

programme.title: La Mujer de Judas
programme.desc: La Mujer de Judas - El Periodista y Priscila: Emma le aconseja a Alirio que van a desviar la atención de Romero hacia Marcos porque hizo creer a Natalia que había algo entre el periodista y Priscila.

programme.title: Safir
programme.desc: Safir - Defendiendo a Feraye: Los Gülsoy celebran una cena con los Bakırcı. Feraye acude a una fiesta de la escuela donde conoce a Bora, quien no le quita la vista de encima.

programme.title: El Amor Frente al Poder
programme.desc: El Amor Frente al Poder - ¿Qué Somos?: Rüveyda intenta escapar pero no lo logra, Alí la lleva a comer. Zuhré llama a Zeyit, él llega hasta su trabajo y le pregunta que es lo que son.

programme.title: El Amor Frente al Poder
programme.desc: El Amor Frente al Poder - Nosotros Somos Los Ricos: Zeyit continúa preocupado por Rüveyda. Ali intenta ayudarla a escapar, pero su padre lo descrubre y lo expone frente al resto de la familia.

programme.title: El Amor Frente al Poder
programme.desc: El Amor Frente al Poder - Buscando Un Trato: Zuhré se da cuenta de donde estaba Rüveyda y decide tomar cartas en el asunto. Ella termina buscando a Fikret para hacer un trato.

programme.title: El Amor Frente al Poder
programme.desc: El Amor Frente al Poder - Pedido Especial: Luego de todo lo vivido Rüveyda perdona a Zuhré por todo aquello por lo cual antes la culpaba. Alí no deja de pensar en lo ocurrido.

programme.title: Infieles
programme.desc: Infieles - Murat: Un amigo en común de Ozan y Beril, Murat, llega al pueblo para un evento que se lleva a cabo allí. Asli y Ozan, por su parte, planean reunirse aprovechando este evento.

programme.title: Infieles
programme.desc: Infieles - Retorno: Mientras Ozan regresa a casa con su familia, dejando atrás lo que vivió con Asli, Asli se encuentra en medio del caos en la granja.

programme.title: Infieles
programme.desc: Infieles - Sin Mirar Atrás: Han pasado varios meses desde los acontecimientos y Ozan y Beril han decidido seguir adelante con sus vidas después de la confrontación. Lo mismo sucede con Asli y Volkan.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Nuevos Amigos: Fatmagül está cada vez más cansada de vivir con Mukaddes. Erdogan decide tomar su lugar en la empresa inmediatamente. Kerim y Fatmagül hacen nuevos amigos.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Convivencia: Mustafá se da cuenta de que lo están vigilando. Eve Nine le pide a Kerim que haga algo para resolver la situación de Fatmagül. Vivir con Mukaddes se vuelve cada vez más complicado.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Llamada: Vural habla y mete en problemas a los demás. Munir debe ir de nuevo a salvarlos. Selim falta a un evento familiar importante. Fatmagül consigue hacer una llamada y Eve Nine la descubre.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Aquella Noche: El suegro de Selim está muy molesto y le pone un ultimátum. Eve Nine y Mukaddes van al pueblo. Erdogan y Vural siguen en prisión y Kerim le dice la verdad a Fatmagül sobre esa noche.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Dudas: Kerim obliga a Fatmagül a hablar con él pero ella sigue sin creerle. Eve Nine está muy feliz de haber encontrado trabajo. Kerim se da cuenta que irse es más difícil de lo que cree.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Futuro: Eve Nine les da esperanzas a Fatmagül de tener un mejor futuro y comienza a hacer planes. Asu es terriblemente humillada. Erdogan y Selim tienen una pelea.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Confusión: Kerim tiene trabas al tramitar su visa. Fatmagül se siente confundida. Rahmi por fin enfrenta a Mukaddes. Erdogan y su padre hacen un plan para tener más poder dentro de la empresa.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Desesperanza: Kerim y los demás tienen problemas con los dueños de la casa. Mustafá recibe visita de un viejo amigo. Fatmagül hace una llamada que le quita toda esperanza.

programme.title: Amor real: Siempre te amaré
programme.desc: Matilde le dice a Manuel que siempre lo amará y que está feliz porque se solucionó el problema de Adolfo. Antonia le dice a Rosario que ya está vieja y que es tiempo de dejarle el lugar a una persona más joven.

programme.title: Corazón indomable: Propuesta de matrimonio
programme.desc: Maricruz llora desconsolada en su habitación, pues el corazón le gana al ver a Octavio y no puede cumplir su venganza el príncipe Karim le pide a Maricruz que sea su esposa.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro: Promesa alentadora
programme.desc: Renata arregla los conflictos con Regina y ésta última pide hablar con Fina. Renata es echada de la casa por Roberta y le reclama el dije que le pertenece. Fina comienza a ejecutar su plan y se hace unos análisis con la ayuda de su médico.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: Noticia embarazosa
programme.desc: Regina se encuentra con François, quien amenaza con matar a Constancio. Julio amenaza con matar a Damián y a Carla. Mili arruina el anuncio de Alejandro ante la familia al revelar que será papá y todos creen que es ella quien está embarazada.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Temores
programme.desc: Juan le propone a Sofía huir de nuevo. El Padre le pide a Oscar pensar bien las cosas antes de quererse realmente casar. Fernando se descuida y Gabriela casi descubre la carta que le dejó Don Bernardo.

programme.title: Destilando amor: Locura pasional
programme.desc: Minerva y Fedra idean un nuevo plan para evitar que Rodrigo se reencuentre con Gaviota. Aarón le ofrece a Gaviota ser la nueva gerente de las empresas Montalvo.

programme.title: Teresa: Nuevo hogar
programme.desc: Teresa está decidida a irse de su casa para vivir con Arturo. Refugio se pone mal y es llevada al hospital.

programme.title: Rubí: Nuevas propuestas
programme.desc: Rubí se encuentra en Cancún y conoce al dueño del hotel en donde se hospedan Yago Pietrasanta queda impactado por belleza de Rubí Luis le dice a Héctor que Rubí esta con él por dinero, no por amor y se niega a creerlo.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Tita sigue saliendo con Nandito para que María no lo vea más. Agripina no deja de preocuparse. Soraya logra llamar la atención del papá de Alicia.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Tita realiza una fiesta en su casa e invita a Nandito solo para desenmascararlo frente a María pero las cosas no salen como ella esperaba. María presenta a Nandito ante toda la familia.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: El Chupes y doña Filo se casan. Mística recibe la noticia de que está embarazada. María Mercedes regaña a Rosario por haber salido con Ricardo.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Magnolia le confiesa a Memo que ella es su madre. María Mercedes tiene los dolores de parto, pero aún es prematuro y ella teme que su bebé pueda morir.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Marimar decide regalar 10 hectáreas de su tierra a la gente del pueblo y compromete a Sergio a hacer lo mismo Marimar culpa a Chuy de robarle dinero.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Marimar tendrá que abandonar la hacienda porque sus tierras son yacimientos de petróleo Sergio quiere proteger los intereses de Marimar y su hija.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Tita sigue saliendo con Nandito para que María no lo vea más. Agripina no deja de preocuparse. Soraya logra llamar la atención del papá de Alicia.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Tita realiza una fiesta en su casa e invita a Nandito solo para desenmascararlo frente a María pero las cosas no salen como ella esperaba. María presenta a Nandito ante toda la familia.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Mariela le pide ayuda a Justino para encontrar a Max y que les devuelva su dinero. Fausta fallece por culpa de Leonora. Max huye del país y se va a Nueva York. Cristina le confiesa a Renato que lo ama, Rogelio los escucha y le dispara.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Rodrigo le dice a José María que terminó con ella porque siempre ha estado enamorado de él. Sara entrega a Rogelio a la policía. Renato le confiesa a Mariano que tiene un amorío con Cristina. Ivana escucha que Julio y Leonora fueron amantes.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: El juez le niega la libertad condicional a Justino al ser acusado por las muertes de Alejandro y de Basilio. Malena y Mariela no hacen nada para impedir que Justino sea transferido a la cárcel.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Mariano le informa a Antonia y su familia que Justino fue trasladado a prisión. Violeta le cuenta a Antonia que Maximiliano le pidió huir con el dinero que robó.

programme.title: La que no podía amar

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | Original Big-block Camaros in Arizona

programme.title: Revelations with Jason Cammisa | Lamborghini Miura and the original Acura NSX
programme.desc: This episode of Revelations with Jason Cammisa features the stories behind the Lamborghini Miura and the original Acura NSX

programme.title: The Driver's Seat with Henry Catchpole | Bentley Continental GT and Lamborghini Huracán Tecnica Reviews
programme.desc: In this episode of The Driver's Seat, automotive journalist Henry Catchpole reviews the new Bentley Continental GT and the Lamborghini Huracán Tecnica

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | Lifetime collection of cars leaves Tom speechless
programme.desc: Tom visits his old friend Dave Coleman who has collected many more "barn finds" on his property since Tom last saw him. Get a tour of Dave's property that's filled with interesting and rare cars.

programme.title: MODIFIED
programme.sub-title: The Legendary RUF CTR Yellowbird and a 911-beating Cayman
programme.desc: Bruce Meyer lent Matt Farah this first-built RUF CTR Yellowbird, a car built by one of the most legendary European tuners. Next, Matt jumps in a heavily modified Porsche Cayman and discovers the potential it has for being BETTER than a 911.

programme.title: Ultimate Drag Race Replay | Corvettes vs. The World
programme.desc: We drag race the first-ever hybrid, all-wheel-drive Corvette E-Ray against two Italian Supercars: the Ferrari F8 and Lamborghini Huracan Evo RWD. After that, it's the 2023 C8 Corvette Z06 against a Porsche 992 GT3, a Ducati V4 SP2, and an Audi R8.

programme.title: Revelations with Jason Cammisa | The Stories Behind Mazda's Miata and RX-7
programme.desc: The unlikely success story of the Mazda MX-5 Miata: the world's bestselling 2-seat roadster and the only remaining true lightweight sports car. The 3rd-gen Mazda RX-7 has it all: beauty, performance, a Le Mans tie-in, and a sales failure.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | $4M Barn Find
programme.sub-title: Rare Ferrari and 427 Shelby Cobra hidden for decades
programme.desc: Tom makes an incredible discovery! Behind the doors of a condemned garage lies two amazing cars, a 1966 Ferrari 275 GTB/2 and a 1967 Shelby Cobra 427. Follow along as Tom discovers, helps extract, and then attends the auction for these rare cars.

programme.title: The Appraiser | Modified Jaguar MK II, a rare Fiat Abarth, and a Toyota FJ40
programme.desc: Colin Comer takes a look at a modified Jaguar Mark II and determines if the modifications were worth the investment. Next, Colin gives us the inside scoop on a car 2-cylinder Fiat Abarth and a Toyota FJ40 Land Cruiser.

programme.title: The Appraiser | Custom 1970 Ford F100, 1988 Lamborghini LM002, 1971 Ford Bronco
programme.desc: In this episode, Colin Comer appraises a freshly built barn find 1970 Ford F100 pickup truck, an original-owner 1988 Lamborghini LM002 aka the “Rambo Lambo," and a 1971 Ford Bronco that has been used in some interesting off-road situations.

programme.title: The Appraiser | 2020 Ford GT, 1976 Pontiac Trans-Am, Aston Martin DB4
programme.desc: Colin tries to put a value on a 2020 Ford GT that has one of the most desirable paint combinations and trim packages you could get in 2020. After that, Colin focuses his attention on a 1967 Pontiac Trans-Am and a 1962 Aston Martin DB4.

programme.title: The Appraiser | 1969 COPO Camaro, 1969 Mustang Mach 1, and a 1969 Z/28 Camaro RS
programme.desc: Colin Comer starts this episode out with an original 1969 double COPO Camaro before moving onto a well-driven and well-loved 1969 Ford Mustang Mach 1. To wrap things up, Colin appraises a well-documented 1969 Chevy Camaro Z/28 "DZ-code."

programme.title: The Appraiser | All about Ford Mustangs!
programme.desc: Colin Comer appraises a trio of interesting Ford Mustangs. A 1993 Ford SVT Cobra, 1966 Shelby GT350 Hertz edition, and a 1966 Mustang with 350,000 miles on the odometer!

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: This is story about hope for the future in the face of heartbreaking tragedy, when "Making It Right" takes on a new meaning- completing an unresolved renovation and making it possible for a family to finally begin the healing process after the loss of a loved one. The connection between the emotional health of a family and condition of their home is a strong one. Mike and the team heal a house left in limbo, and make it a home once more.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: With Mike and the team in full swing repairing the shoddy fire damage remediation work left behind by the last contractor, Mike discovers an old oil storage tank buried in the backyard. To make matters worse, the container had leaked over the years, making it necessary for Mike to clean up the hazardous mess. It's an episode filled with renovation thrills and toxic spills!

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Keep the faith as Mike fixes a $30K bathroom reno that became an unholy mess.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Kathleen, an elderly lady who lives alone in a small high-rise apartment, needed to renovate her bathroom to make it handicap accessible. A degenerative illness had necessitated her use of a wheelchair. After a year of renovations, and two different companies, Mike arrives to find that the bathroom is nothing but a concrete shell- the last contractor tore out all their work before leaving. Mike makes it right, and then transforms the rest of the apartment into a more friendly space for wheelchairs.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Peep behind the camera for insights into how each episode of the show is made.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: The pork shoulder, aka Boston butt, gives us Carolina pulled pork. The majestic beef shoulder (yes, there is such a cut) becomes a Texas barbecued beef clod. As for lamb shoulder, Moroccans cook it in a fire-heated underground clay oven to make their legendary mechoui. This show explores the richest, meatiest, most flavorful cut you find in the meat department: the shoulder. (S2 E10)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Chino-Latino originated with Chinese laborers who immigrated to Cuba, Trinidad, and elsewhere in the Caribbean to work the plantations. They developed a unique mashup of Asian and West Indian cooking—the subject of today's show. Get ready for tangerine teriyaki chicken, butter rum grilled plantains, smoky baby back ribs with guava barbecue sauce, and Korean brisket tacos. (S2 E11)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: In Miami, our food culture is firmly anchored in Latin America and the West Indies. Our Miami Spice menu begins with a Project Fire first: the grilled mojito cocktail. Next comes Florida lobster grilled with rum butter baste and mango salsa, then plate-burying island spice beef plate ribs. Our grand finale? Turkey adobo with garlicky mojo de ajo. (S2 E12)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Steak. It offers an irrefutable argument for simplicity, but it can also be the perfect foil for all the rubs, marinades, butters, and sauces you can throw at it. It's easy to grill, but takes a lifetime to perfect. Let's take a look back on how steak has evolved through three iconic TV series: Primal Grill, Project Smoke, and Project Fire. (S2 E13)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Barbecue Health Food: A little-known fact-Steven Raichlen's first James Beard Award-winning book wasn't about barbecue, but a book on healthy eating. This show harnesses the flavor- boosting, fat-melting power of live fire to produce grilled fare that not only tastes good but is good for you. From the paellas of Spain to the grilled beef salads of Southeast Asia. (S3 E01)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Steak. Few other words in the English language have such power to make our hearts beat faster and our mouths water than sizzling slabs of beef seared over live fire. In this show we embark on some meaty globe hopping, exploring over-the-top steaks from France, Cambodia, and the American Southwest. Hot fire. Sizzling meat. It's a carnivore's dream come true. (S3 E02)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Let Texans brag about brisket and Carolinians praise pulled pork shoulder. For the rest of us, the ultimate symbol of barbecue is ribs. In the American Midwest, ribs mean baby backs or other pork ribs, while in Korea, the bone of choice is the beef short rib. In the eastern Mediterranean, lamb ribs reign supreme. In this show we give you three of the best ribs ever. (S3 E03)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Killer Barbecue – Hold the Meat You don't need a degree in barbecue to know that vegetables have hit the grill big time. Veggies for hardcore carnivores who crave killer accompaniments to their meats, for health-conscious grillers, and for everyone who delights in the smokiness and supernatural sweetness live fire imparts to plant and dairy foods. (S3 E04)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Charm City ‘Que: Baltimore, the town where I grew up, boasts plenty of awesome foods for grilling. Pit beef was born here. In the seafood department you find a sweet white-fleshed fish the rest of the world calls striped bass and Baltimoreans know as rockfish. And no Charm City meal would be complete without chocolate top cookies. (S3 E05)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Barbecue on a Budget: A lot of American barbecue began with inexpensive meat cuts, like spareribs, beef shoulder, and pork belly. With the economic insecurities brought on by COVID- 9, we're all feeling the pinch, and budget grilling has taken on new urgency. Besides, why should Kobe beef and tomahawk steaks get all the love? This is barbecue on a budget. (S3 E06)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Sustainable Seafood: Pollution. Overfishing. Abusive labor practices. There's a lot of negative news coming out about the seafood industry lately, and much of it breaks your heart. Today's show celebrates seafood we can eat because it's fished in a way that's humane and environmentally sound. Activists call it sustainable seafood. I call it three great reasons for firing up your grill. (S3 E07)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Social Distance Tailgating: From its humble origins on the back of a buckboard wagon to today's high-octane outdoor foodie extravaganzas, tailgating continues to enthrall—make that obsess—American sports fans. This episode is our our annual celebration of tailgating with a global twist. The socializing may be distant this year—all the more reason to up your game at the grill. (S3 E08)

programme.title: A Zamboni?
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a debtor's tattooing session to reclaim his vehicle. Then, Sonia and Lyndah find themselves in an uncomfortable situation when they barge in on a couple engaging in some risqué role-playing. And finally, Lou & Matt hit the ice and a bunch of irate hockey players in an effort to repossess a Zamboni

programme.title: Jet Skis and Massages
programme.desc: First, the team heads to the beach to grab a little sun as well as two luxury jet skis. Then, Lou and Froy get in touch with their sensitive side when they confront a massage therapist who's as skilled with her hands as she is with her feet. And finally, Lou and Sonia are unknowingly hired to pull a prank on a debtor, which could cost everyone.

programme.title: Wrench in the Works
programme.desc: First, a wrench is thrown in the works, and at the car, when Froy and Matt try to repo from a plumber. Then, the duo go out again to try to repo a car from a slap-happy debtor, but unfortunately the car has a boot on it. And finally, Froy, Matt, Lyndah, and Sonia head out to the ranch to repo a tractor from some pushy ranch hands.

programme.title: Role-players and Blade Swayers
programme.desc: Lou, Matt, and Froy get interrupted on a routine job by a registered owner with an unregistered blade. Then, Matt and Froy head out to the country to reclaim a Prius from a quintet of socially maladapted role-players.

programme.title: Get That Prowler
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab by tricking its driver into picking them up. But what to do with his ferociously inebriated client? Then, Matt and Froy attempt to repo a DeLorean from a debtor whose car isn't all that's stuck in the 80's. Finally, Lou and Sonia square off against an overgrown child who isn't giving up his Plymouth Prowler without a tussle.

programme.title: Bouquets and Blowtorches
programme.desc: The team returns from a successful mission in Vegas, but there's trouble brewing within the crew's ranks. Ronnie and Carlos repo from a self-defense instructor who lets his students do his dirty work, Matt and Froy confront a delinquent delivery man steeling flowers from graves, and Lou and Carlos are left defenseless against gang members with blowtorches. Can Lou still keep his cool in the high pressure repo business, or will there be repercussions for Matt and Froy that no one saw coming?

programme.title: Repo Arigato, Mr. Roboto
programme.desc: Sonia and Carlos put their best performance in when they attempt to repossess a vehicle from a pair of silver-painted robot men.? Matt and Froy need a second opinion when they run into a debtor with a questionable claim about a life-threatening illness.?

programme.title: The Car That Rolled Away
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah try to negotiate a set of keys away from a raucous group of drunken outdoorsmen. Then, Froy and Lyndah repo a vehicle from a unruly and untalented guitarist. Plus, Froy and Sonia bite off more than they can chew when they try to reclaim an SUV from a confused and embittered former football player.

programme.title: Matt & Froy Auto Recovery
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia make their way to a home in the hills to clean a germaphobe of his car. Then, it's Matt and Froy's big repo. Having left the company to start their own, they head out after a high-end exotic car from outside a mansion. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Lou's cousin Rob drive out to a used car lot to pick up a few cars, but the owner has been hurt by the economy and now he's ready to do the hurting.

programme.title: Gypsy Barbeque!
programme.desc: A jazz musician sets off Sonia and punches are thrown as Ronnie tries to manage the mayhem, and Matt and Sonia wrestle to bring deluded actors back to reality.

programme.title: M.I.A. & D.E.A
programme.desc: When Matt and Froy go missing, Sonia is on a mission to figure out what they've got up their sleeves.

programme.title: Kegger and Refrigerator
programme.desc: First, Lyndah has some tension with Frankie when they repo a truck from a moving company in the middle of relocating some fragile material for a very important client. Then, Froy, Sonia, and Frankie crash a raging kegger in a bad part of town and have to contend with a gaggle of irate partiers in order to secure their target vehicle. Finally, Lou and Matt find themselves in one of the worst situations imaginable when they realize that the car they're trying to repo has been fitted with what seems to be an explosive device.

programme.title: Smart and Stupids
programme.desc: Lou and Froy repo a vehicle in a bad part of town and somebody gets punched in the face. Then, Sonia and Lyndah interrupt a tennis match to retrieve an automobile. Plus, Matt and Froy confront an out-of-control director in the middle of a shoot.

programme.title: Win Some, Quarrelsome, Lose Some
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia have an order for a Jaguar behind a retail outlet center, but will the loaders let their precious car be loaded up without a fight? Then, Matt and Froy find themselves amidst a lover's quarrel when a disgruntled wife reveals that she stopped payment on her car because of her cheating husband. And finally, a debtor is nowhere to be found when Lou, Lyndah, and Rob head out to a seemingly quiet neighborhood. The silence is broken when the debtor finally shows up in another vehicle with bang!

programme.title: Knife Week
programme.desc: Matt and Froy head to Texas to clear Froy's name, but things take a turn for the worse and Froy finds himself in more trouble than he can handle. Back in LA, Lou and Lyndah repo a car from a deceptive charity worker, and Lou is left to protect the girls from two knife wielding debtors who will go to any lengths to keep their vehicles.

programme.title: The Hobby
programme.desc: A McDonald's Happy Meal shortage. A security guard escort. Guns pulled in a Target parking lot. All of these are caused by a common factor: trading cards. In 2020, a new BOOM began. For the first time, large hedge funds, celebrities like Logan Paul and Steve Aoki, nostalgic millennials, entrepreneurs like Josh Luber, and billionaires scrambled to add sports, Pokémon, and other hot item cards to their collections and portfolios. Over the next two years, the hobby exploded — even causing card grading services to shut down due to overwhelming customer service. This documentary is a character-driven feel good deep dive into the high-stakes, eccentric world of card collecting, following buyers, sellers, card shop owners, graders, online streamers, auctioneers, and more, who all participate in the hobby in their own unique ways. Directed by Morgan Jon Fox.

programme.title: Noma: My Perfect Storm
programme.desc: Creative genius René Redzepi is renowned as one of the world's best chefs. His restaurant Noma was voted best restaurant in the world four times. He has been credited with revolutionizing the food world with his radical take on classic cuisine. Explore his universe with unprecedented access into his kitchen as he strives to achieve perfection and concoct bold, exciting dishes for diners from around the world. Directed by Pierre Deschamps

programme.title: Tickled
programme.desc: After stumbling upon a bizarre “competitive endurance tickling” video online, wherein young men are paid to be tied up and tickled, reporter David Farrier reaches out to request a story from the company. But the reply he receives is shocking—the sender mocks Farrier's sexual orientation and threatens extreme legal action should he dig any deeper. So, like any good journalist confronted by a bully, he does just the opposite: he travels to the hidden tickling facilities in Los Angeles and uncovers a vast empire, known for harassing and harming the lives of those who protest their involvement in these films. The more he investigates, the stranger it gets, discovering secret identities and criminal activity. With humor and determination, Farrier and co-director Dylan Reeve summon up every resource available to get to the bottom of this tickling wormhole. Directed by David Farrier

programme.title: On Her Shoulders
programme.desc: Nadia Murad, a 23-year-old Yazidi, survived genocide and sexual slavery committed by ISIS. Repeating her story to the world, this ordinary girl finds herself thrust onto the international stage as the voice of her people. Directed by Alexandria Bombach.

programme.title: On Safari
programme.sub-title: Thanda Safari, Thanda Private Game Reserve, Kwa-Zulu Natal
programme.desc: Sika's third Safari destination THANDA, meaning ‘Love' in isiZulu, is a proud member of “The Leading Hotels of the World” and known for exclusive close-up encounters with Africa's magnificent Big Five. The Lodge offers a unique Safari Experience with a deep Love and passionate commitment to the vibrant Zulu Culture and its History as well as critical Conservation efforts of the Wildlife and the environment.

programme.title: On Safari
programme.sub-title: Kapama Karula, Kapama Private Game Reserve, Greater Kruger
programme.desc: Set on the banks of the perennial Klaserie River, Sika's fourth Safari Destination KAPAMA KARULA is the flagship Five-star lodge of Kapama Game Reserve. KAPAMA, meaning ‘place of peace', is an ultra-luxurious and prestigious Lodge that exudes calmness and depicts the pinnacle of elegant Safari accommodation, with wraparound views of the African bush enhancing the overall sense of tranquillity. A special Safari experience is the Romantic Sleep-out Platform where Guests can sleep under the Stars on a raised platform in the middle of the African plains.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives, Hidden Places - Great Gobi National Park: Mongolia - Following the Wild Camels
programme.desc: The Great Gobi Nationalpark in the southwest of Mongolia is home oft he most fascinationg mammals alive: the wild camels. The arcaic desert, impenetrable and misterious, ist he home of approximately 800 wild camels which are nearly extinct. The Gobi is one of the most sparsely populated areas around the world. We experience humans which live in the rough and misanthropic desert: Jangaa who breeds camels and specialises in camel polo Surendjav who owns a salt mine Erdene who built an oasis in the middle of the dessert.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives, Hidden Places - Gaoligongshan Park: China - Himalaya's Gold
programme.desc: In western China, along the border to Tibet is the Baima Snow Mountain reserve. Both humans and animals have to be persistant, willpowered and strong to be able to survive in over 3000 metres height. The Baima snow mountain reserve is one of the most mysterious and impenetrable regions of the world, full of breathtaking beauty and contrasts.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives, Hidden Places - Gir National Park: India - Asia's Last Lion
programme.desc: In the west of India live wildcats which you wouldn't expect in India: lions. They live and roam freely in a surrounding where natives live as well. The Maldhari are proud to live in a region together with the lions, although they kill their cattle now and then. The north of Gujarat is mostly a desert where seminomads live. The Fakirani Jat breed a very special camel race: Karai-Camels which are able to swim. The camels swim daily around 3 kilometres to mangrove islands to feed.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives, Hidden Places - Kinabatangan River: Borneo - Forgotten Paradise
programme.desc: The Kinabatangan winds for over 560 kilometres across the north of Borneo. Nowhere else in Sabah live as many wild and rare animals as along the river: Orang-Utans, Elephants, crocodiles and proboscis monkeys. But the biodiversity is endangered because more and more palm oil plantations replace the rainforest. The natives fight for the preservation of the forest and the unique wildlife.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers take a majestic helicopter ride high above NYC for inspiration for their next challenge: to create an editorial, high fashion look for Marie Claire magazine. Guest judges Anne Fulenwider and Camilla Belle join the panel.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers are challenged to draw inspiration from metal and machinery for their next look. However, in another Project Runway first, they must create their avant-garde design using the metallic unconventional materials, as well as conventional materials from Mood. Shiri Appleby joins the judging panel.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: In the final challenge before Fashion Week, the designers take a surprise trip to Austin, Texas, where the city's unofficial slogan is “Keep Austin Weird!” Once there, the designers are faced with an Unconventional Materials Challenge, leading them to create amazing (and weird!) pieces with the knowledge that the losing designer will be sent home just one step away from Fashion Week. Guest judge Priyanka Chopra joins.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: After heading home to work on their Fashion Week collections, the designers are visited by Tim, who is not impressed with everything they have created so far. The designers return to NYC and present the judges with three pieces from their collection, and all of them realize how much work they have left before presenting all of their pieces at Fashion Week. Michael Kors returns as a guest judge.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Fashion Week is finally here, and the designers rush to put the final touches on their collections. Four designers will have their dream of showing at New York Fashion Week, but only one designer will reach the ultimate goal of being crowned the next Project Runway winner! Guest judge Zendaya joins the panel.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The Season 15 designers reunite with mentor Tim Gunn to discuss their Project Runway experience. They come ready to reminisce, share emotions, and settle scores.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The hour-long casting special Road to the Runway gives a first look at Project Runway Season 16. The designers are introduced and footage from the casting process is shown, as well as their home and closet tours.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.sub-title: One Size Does Not Fit All
programme.desc: The designers enter Season 16 in style as they must create a red carpet look that demonstrates their fashion point of view. But the real surprise comes when the designers learn they will be working with models of all sizes! Guest judge Olivia Munn joins.

programme.title: Wanderlust: Earth And Stars II
programme.desc: Earth And Stars E2: Earth Day — A beautiful, artistic tribute to our planet, from splendid skyscapes and depictions of our solar system, to sprawling forests, snow-capped mountains, and marine animals. The range of styles explore our connection to the vast and vivid universe.

programme.title: Autumn Harvest II
programme.desc: Autumn Harvest E2 — Immerse yourself in a kaleidoscope of fall foliage, where trees dance in radiant shades and leaves gently cascade in the crisp breeze. Delight in intricate still-life images capturing the essence of pumpkin spice and evoking a sense of nostalgia

programme.title: Halloween Party
programme.desc: Halloween Party S1E1 — Bold colors and haunting melodies bring out the magic of Halloween, inviting viewers to revel in the merriment of the holiday. From grinning skulls to moonlit scenes, the collection enchants with its lighthearted take on spooky.

programme.title: Pink Warriors
programme.desc: Pink Warriors S1E1 — This art collection captures unyielding power of women, mirroring the brave fight against breast cancer. The infusion of pink spreads awareness and celebrates the strength within every woman while the music adds an uplifting celebration of life.

programme.title: Hispanic Artists Now I
programme.desc: Hispanic Artists Now E1 — A colorful journey through time and culture, showcasing the diverse talents of artists with Latin American roots. The artwork is accompanied by mid-tempo tunes with influences that stretch across Reggaeton, Flamenco, Baille, Salsa, and Latin Jazz.

programme.title: Hispanic Artists Now II
programme.desc: Diverse Perspectives: Hispanic Artists Now E2 — From bold murals to evocative photographs, this collection illuminates the rich heritage and unique perspectives of Latin American artists. The melodies are bright, and the instruments feature guitars, keys, horns, synths, bongos, and shakers.
